# Best Kitchen and Bathroom Remodeling — Seattle

> Seattle's top-rated kitchen and bathroom remodeling company. Award-winning craftsmanship, transparent pricing, and free estimates. Serving Seattle, Bellevue, Kirkland, and the greater Puget Sound area since 2010. Licensed, bonded, insured. 4.9/5 stars across 347+ verified reviews.

## About
- Company: Best Kitchen and Bathroom Remodeling
- Location: 701 5th Ave 42nd Floor, Suite 4272, Seattle, WA 98104
- Phone: (206) 666-4370
- Email: info@kitchenandbathroomremodelingpros.com
- Website: https://kitchenandbathroomremodelingpros.com
- License: KBREMRP787P3
- Rating: 4.9/5 (347+ reviews)
- Founded: 2010
- Warranty: 5-Year craftsmanship warranty
- Employees: 10-25
- Projects Completed: 500+
